free_text: Isomer ratios for 196,198Tl and 196,198Au from fusion
and transfer in the interaction of 6He with 197Au
The sum of ground and metastable cross sections for
Tl-198, Tl-196, Au-196, Au-198 is given.
U400 and U400M cyclotrons. U400M was
used for He-6 beam production. U400 was used for He-6
beam acceleration.
Intensity of He-6 beam was 2*10**7 part/sec. Energy
spread was 0.4 MeV.
Gold foils with the thickness from 13.5 to 50 um.
MSP-144 was used for measuring the beam
energy on entering and exiting each target.
was used for measurements of gamma-quanta
activity. Efficiency was 4-5%.
SD: Correction in all Subents.
Contribution of the metastable state was subtracted.
The main contribution of the error is from
statistical uncertainties in calculating the number
of counts in the photopeak.
